paper_title: CVA6-RT: an Open-Source Time-Predictable RV64 Processor for Mixed-Criticality Systems
description: CVA6-RT extends the open-source RISC-V CVA6 core with hardware-based time-predictability mechanisms: TLB partitioning and locking, L1 cache-to-scratchpad reconfiguration, and low-latency interrupt handling via an enhanced CLIC and hardware-assisted context stacking. It achieves 12-cycle interrupt latency (10× reduction vs. baseline) and significantly reduces variability, enabling soft real-time execution in mixed-criticality systems.
